rootCause: The Layout inline script imported offlineToast from /src/scripts, leaving an unbundled /src/scripts/offlineToast.js reference in the 404 build output and breaking Windows/Linux parity checks.
resolution: Confirmed Layout.astro only loads the toast from the public /scripts path and updated build validation to rebuild from a clean dist so stale /src/script references cannot persist in server chunks like 404.
